local_ai_infrastructure.name: Ollama
local_ai_infrastructure.description: Local LLM inference. Runs qwen2.5:7b, llama3.2:3b, nomic-embed-text. No GPU needed. Core of Noor System.

local_ai_infrastructure.name: qwen2.5:7b
local_ai_infrastructure.description: Primary reasoning model. 7.62B params, Q4_K_M quantization. 4.36GB. Agent coordination, Quran/Hadith queries.

local_ai_infrastructure.name: llama3.2:3b
local_ai_infrastructure.description: Lightweight fallback model. 2.0GB. Quick tasks when qwen2.5:7b is overloaded.

local_ai_infrastructure.name: nomic-embed-text
local_ai_infrastructure.description: Vector embedding model. 274MB. Powers semantic search in Quran index and discovery vault.

local_ai_infrastructure.name: LocalAI
local_ai_infrastructure.description: OpenAI-compatible local LLM inference. Alternative to Ollama if needed.

local_ai_infrastructure.name: llama.cpp
local_ai_infrastructure.description: Core C++ inference engine that Ollama uses under the hood.

free_llm_apis.name: OpenRouter
free_llm_apis.description: 30+ free models: DeepSeek V4, Llama 3.3 70B, Gemma 4 26B, Grok 4.1 Fast, Qwen3-Next 80B, Kimi K2, Hermes 3 405B. 20 req/min, 50 req/day free.

free_llm_apis.name: Google AI Studio
free_llm_apis.description: Gemini 2.5 Flash with 1M context window. Generous free tier.

free_llm_apis.name: NVIDIA NIM
free_llm_apis.description: Llama 3.3 70B at 2,600 tok/s. 40 req/min free. 1,000 free credits.

agent_frameworks.name: OpenClaw
agent_frameworks.description: 2026's fastest-growing agent framework. System-level control, skill marketplace, persistent memory, 7×24 autonomous. MIT license.

agent_frameworks.name: Coco
agent_frameworks.description: 59 skills, 34 commands, 10 agents, 24 GSD subagents. /team:ship pipeline: Researcher→Architect→Planner→Reviewer→Fixer→Builder→Verifier. MIT.

agent_frameworks.name: OoderAgent
agent_frameworks.description: 137+ skills, P2P sharing, zero-deploy. Coverage across LLM, IM, payments, media. MIT.

agent_frameworks.name: CAMEL
agent_frameworks.description: Role-based simulation framework for multi-agent cooperation.

agent_frameworks.name: Goose
agent_frameworks.description: Jack Dorsey/Block's agent framework. Apache 2.0. MCP-native.

agent_frameworks.name: OpenCognit
agent_frameworks.description: Zero Human Company OS. CEO orchestrator, persistent memory, atomic budgets. Free forever.

agent_frameworks.name: SwarmWeaver
agent_frameworks.description: Autonomous coding agent with swarm orchestration. 6 modes, CLI+Web UI.

agent_frameworks.name: Paperclip
agent_frameworks.description: 60K stars. OSS agent orchestration for zero-human companies.

agent_frameworks.name: Conductor
agent_frameworks.description: Microsoft's deterministic multi-agent workflows in YAML. Released May 2026. MIT.

agent_frameworks.name: AgentClaw
agent_frameworks.description: Generates agents from single sentences. One pip install. Saves 90% of work.

agent_protocols.name: A2A Protocol v1.0
agent_protocols.description: Google→Linux Foundation. Agent-to-agent communication. 150+ organizations in production. SDKs in Python, Go, Rust.

agent_protocols.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
agent_protocols.description: Anthropic's protocol for AI-tool integration. Industry standard.

agent_protocols.name: GNAP
agent_protocols.description: Git-native agent protocol. State stored in git, portable everywhere. Zero infrastructure.

agent_protocols.name: ACP (Agent Client Protocol)
agent_protocols.description: IBM's agent protocol. Merged into A2A in 2026.

agent_protocols.name: AIMEAT
agent_protocols.description: Agent identity, memory, economy, federation. Plain HTTP+JSON. RFC v3.0 March 2026. MIT.

agent_protocols.name: Beam
agent_protocols.description: SMTP for AI agents. Natural language agent communication. Apache 2.0.

agent_protocols.name: NSP Protocol
agent_protocols.description: HTTP for the Agentic Web. 100% free, radically neutral. SDKs for LangChain, ElizaOS.

memory_systems.name: RecallOS
memory_systems.description: 96.6% LongMemEval R@5. pip install recallos. CLI unstable — vault init failed on our Mac. Highest-scoring local memory ever benchmarked. Open source. Will retry when stable.

memory_systems.name: SuperLocalMemory V3
memory_systems.description: 87.7% LoCoMo. 3 modes (CPU-only→LLM hybrid). arXiv-published. pip install superlocalmemory.

memory_systems.name: Memvid
memory_systems.description: Single-file memory layer. Serverless, portable. +35% SOTA on LoCoMo. Sub-5ms local access.

memory_systems.name: agentmemory
memory_systems.description: One-line persistent memory for Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI. npx @agentmemory/agentmemory.

memory_systems.name: Sovyx
memory_systems.description: Brain graph in SQLite+sqlite-vec. Hebbian co-activation, Ebbinghaus forgetting, PAD emotional model. Self-hosted.

memory_systems.name: OpenFused
memory_systems.description: Shared, searchable memory via plain files. No vendor lock-in. Agents write what they learn.

memory_systems.name: mcp-memory-service
memory_systems.description: Persistent shared memory for AI agent pipelines. 5ms retrieval. Open-source.

memory_systems.name: MCP Agora
memory_systems.description: Local Python MCP server. ChromaDB vector memory. Cross-agent shared knowledge. uv run agora.

human_ai_workspaces.name: DeskClaw
human_ai_workspaces.description: Open-source human-AI co-managed orgs. Hexagonal topology, shared blackboard, task delegation. MIT.

human_ai_workspaces.name: Eigent
human_ai_workspaces.description: Open-source Cowork desktop. Local-first, zero setup, multi-agent workforce. Built on CAMEL-AI.

human_ai_workspaces.name: Illospace
human_ai_workspaces.description: Human-AI teams with shared memory, skills, vault-backed secrets, Cortex thought threads. Docker+PostgreSQL.

human_ai_workspaces.name: Cabinet
human_ai_workspaces.description: AI-first startup OS. Files on disk, agents with memory, scheduled jobs. No database, no vendor lock-in.

human_ai_workspaces.name: OpenAgentd
human_ai_workspaces.description: Self-hosted AI agent OS. Web cockpit, 3-tier wiki memory, multi-agent teams.

human_ai_workspaces.name: Bitterbot
human_ai_workspaces.description: Local-first AI with biological memory, dream engine, P2P skills economy. USDC wallet + marketplace.

human_ai_workspaces.name: Mesa
human_ai_workspaces.description: Single-binary project management where AI agents are the team. CEO simulator, ships code.

coding_agents.name: free-claude-code
coding_agents.description: Proxy to run Claude Code with Ollama/local models. 24.9K stars. No API key needed.

coding_agents.name: Grinta
coding_agents.description: Local-first coding agent. pipx install grinta-ai. 1.4MB. Provider-agnostic (Ollama/OpenAI/Anthropic). Session checkpoint/resume.

coding_agents.name: OpenMono
coding_agents.description: .NET 10 + llama.cpp bundled. 20 tools, Docker sandbox, MCP. Zero per-token cost.

coding_agents.name: Kimi Code CLI
coding_agents.description: Moonshot AI. Apache 2.0. Native MCP, ACP server. 4000+ lines, 300 sub-agent swarms.

coding_agents.name: DeepCode
coding_agents.description: Autonomous coding agent on DeepSeek V4 free API. Terminal-native.

coding_agents.name: Claude Code
coding_agents.description: Anthropic's coding agent. Extended thinking, terminal-native. Free tier available.

voice_tts.name: VoiPi
voice_tts.description: Universal JS library, zero deps, <100kB. Auto-detects language (Arabic included). MCP Server.

voice_tts.name: HeadTTS
voice_tts.description: Browser-based WebGPU neural TTS. Phoneme timestamps + Oculus visemes for lip-sync. MIT.

voice_tts.name: Sokuji
voice_tts.description: Desktop app, 400+ voices across 100+ languages. Streams live from Bing TTS. Completely free.

voice_tts.name: Out-Loud
voice_tts.description: macOS native desktop app. 100% offline TTS. No cloud, no API.

voice_tts.name: KittenTTS Nano
voice_tts.description: In-browser WebAssembly neural TTS. High-quality voices running entirely in browser.

voice_tts.name: Web Speech API
voice_tts.description: Built into every browser. Zero install, zero cost. Used in Render Flask bridge.

avatars_talking_heads.name: Handcrafted Persona Engine
avatars_talking_heads.description: Live2D avatar with LLM conversation, ASR, TTS, RVC voice. Real-time lip-sync, emotion-driven motions.

avatars_talking_heads.name: LiveTalk
avatars_talking_heads.description: Combines LivePortrait + MuseTalk. ONNX→CoreML optimized for on-device inference in Unity.

avatars_talking_heads.name: Orare AI
avatars_talking_heads.description: Text→talking avatar video pipeline. TTS + lip-sync + animation. Education/announcement focused.

privacy_security_liberation.name: OBLITERATUS
privacy_security_liberation.description: OSS toolkit to remove LLM refusal behaviors without retraining. Model liberation.

privacy_security_liberation.name: Confer
privacy_security_liberation.description: Signal creator Moxie Marlinspike's E2E encrypted AI assistant. WebAuthn passkeys, TEE inference.

privacy_security_liberation.name: xPrivo
privacy_security_liberation.description: Self-hosted privacy-first AI chat. No accounts ever. Local storage. Provider agnostic.

privacy_security_liberation.name: Okara
privacy_security_liberation.description: Private AI chat for original thinkers. Open-source LLMs, zero data leakage.

privacy_security_liberation.name: Briar
privacy_security_liberation.description: Tor-based P2P encrypted messaging. No central server. Works offline via Bluetooth/WiFi.

privacy_security_liberation.name: Session
privacy_security_liberation.description: Decentralized encrypted messaging. No phone/email required. Onion routing.

hosting_deployment.name: Render.com
hosting_deployment.description: Free tier Flask hosting. 750 hrs/month. Deployed jarvis-bridge-jtuc.onrender.com. No credit card.

hosting_deployment.name: Vercel
hosting_deployment.description: Free static + serverless deployment. Auto-deploy from GitHub.

hosting_deployment.name: Supabase
hosting_deployment.description: Free DB/auth/storage. PostgreSQL. Used in Noor System stack.

hosting_deployment.name: Cloudflare Workers
hosting_deployment.description: 100K requests/day free. Edge functions. 30+ AI models.

hosting_deployment.name: Google Colab
hosting_deployment.description: Free T4 GPU. 12-hour session limit. Good for testing.

hosting_deployment.name: Oracle Always Free
hosting_deployment.description: 4 ARM cores, 24GB RAM. Rejected: requires credit card and invasive personal info.

hosting_deployment.name: VPSWala.org
hosting_deployment.description: Claims free VPS. Redirects to paid cart. Community reports fake. Avoid.

hosting_deployment.name: FOSSVPS.org
hosting_deployment.description: 4GB RAM, no CC. Invite-only via LowEndSpirit forums. No public registration button.

hosting_deployment.name: FreeVPS.edu.pl
hosting_deployment.description: 4GB RAM, no CC. Requires .edu email or student ID. Ineligible.

hosting_deployment.name: serv00.com
hosting_deployment.description: 512MB, SSH, no CC. User limit reached. Registration closed.

hosting_deployment.name: Gensee Crate
hosting_deployment.description: Free cloud-hosted OpenClaw agent sandbox. 24/7. No CC. UCSD professor + ex-Google engineers.

tunnels_tested.name: Cloudflare Tunnel
tunnels_tested.description: Quick tunnel created successfully. 403 error from Render: browser-only traffic, blocks server-to-server API calls.

tunnels_tested.name: Serveo
tunnels_tested.description: SSH tunnel created. 403: interstitial warning page breaks API requests from Render.

tunnels_tested.name: Pinggy
tunnels_tested.description: SSH tunnel created. Free tier only allows browser traffic. 403 on API calls.

methodology_insights.name: Crawl-Walk-Run Methodology
methodology_insights.description: Phase-gated deployment. Crawl: one specialist, one task, human-in-the-loop. 40% agent failure rate necessitates this discipline.
